system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

=== Episode ep_142 (day 74) ===
An entry from registry_A dated day 74, valid from day 74, reports as fct_0127: supplies(partner=partner_09, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_07).
Logged on day 74, in force from day 74, fct_0355 from an audit_note records that offered_in(customer=customer_07, sector=sector_01).

=== Episode ep_067 (day 26) ===
On day 25, registry_A records fct_0635 — effective from day 25 — that member_of(partner=partner_02, product=product_11).
registry_B’s entry fct_0701, logged on day 25 and valid from day 25, notes supplies(partner=partner_08, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12).

audit_note fct_0225, recorded on day 26 and valid from day 26, confirms classified_as(product=product_12, customer=customer_09).

=== Episode ep_241 (day 277) ===
Notice sup_014 records that policy rul_007 is superseded by policy rul_035, effective day 275; from day 275, rul_007 no longer applies.
On day 276, registry_B reports fct_0579: rated_as(customer=customer_07, sector=sector_11), valid from day 276.
A customer_disclosure entry on day 277 — reference fct_0490, effective from day 277 — shows offered_in(customer=customer_08, sector=sector_00).
Policy rul_025 ("approved_for policy 2 (revised)", authority level 1, effective from day 277) states: on day 277, IF restricted_in(customer=?A, asset=asset_25, sector=?B) AND supplies(partner=partner_08, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_01) AND supplies(partner=partner_08, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_01) AND registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_06, customer=?A) THEN approved_for(customer=?A, sector=?B), UNLESS supplies(partner=partner_08, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_11) OR offered_in(customer=?A, sector=sector_07).

=== Episode ep_155 (day 92) ===
jurisdiction_09 projects, as of day 91, that member_of(partner=partner_12, product=product_04) will hold — forecast fct_0829.
A partner_feed entry logged on day 92 — reference fct_0065, effective from day 92 — confirms partnered_with(asset=asset_18, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_11).
field_report on day 92 notes holds(asset=asset_13, partner=partner_14) — reference fct_0258, effective from day 92.
partner_feed data from day 92, noted as fct_0582 and in force from day 92, indicates rated_as(customer=customer_00, sector=sector_12).

=== Episode ep_216 (day 208) ===
On day 205, jurisdiction_09 projects — recorded as fct_0832 — that located_in(customer=customer_00, partner=partner_04, sector=sector_07) will hold.
Day 208 brings a note from The Marble Index, where located_in(customer=customer_04, partner=partner_14, sector=sector_11) is part of the world (fct_0740).
Winter in the Annex, also logged on day 208, has it that member_of(partner=partner_03, product=product_06) — recorded as fct_0751.

=== Episode ep_096 (day 41) ===
Logged on day 40, valid from day 40, a registry_A observation (fct_0680) records supplies(partner=partner_15, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_11).
A field_report entry from day 41 — reference fct_0019, in force from day 41 — notes rated_as(customer=customer_14, sector=sector_08).

=== Episode ep_229 (day 239) ===
jurisdiction_09 projects, as of day 237, that located_in(customer=customer_07, partner=partner_14, sector=sector_04) will hold — forecast fct_0835.
Policy rul_033 ("requires_review policy 1 (revised)", authority level 3) takes effect on day 237 and, from day 237, stipulates: IF registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12, customer=?A) AND rated_as(customer=?B, sector=?E) AND partnered_with(asset=?C, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12) THEN requires_review(customer=?A, customer2=?B, asset=?C), UNLESS offered_in(customer=?B, sector=sector_01) OR operates_in(sector=?E, customer=customer_05).
Notice sup_012 records that policy rul_006 is superseded by rul_033 effective day 237; from day 237, rul_006 no longer applies.
jurisdiction_09, on day 238, quipped: "Of course, operates_in(sector=sector_04, customer=customer_00) — how could it be otherwise."
A field_report entry on day 239 — reference fct_0550, valid from day 239 — notes partnered_with(asset=asset_12, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_23).

=== Episode ep_244 (day 285) ===
Under Saffron, day 285 sees the assumption that registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12, customer=customer_00) no longer holds (fct_0778).
Day 285: the Saffron exercise assumes registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12, customer=customer_11) (fct_0779).
Day 285 brings policy rul_032 ("exempt_from policy 1 (revised)", authority level 5, effective day 285): if supplies(partner=partner_08, jurisdiction=?A) and located_in(customer=customer_11, partner=?B, sector=?D) and supplies(partner=?B, jurisdiction=?C) then exempt_from(jurisdiction=?A, partner=?B, jurisdiction2=?C), unless supplies(partner=partner_03, jurisdiction=?A) or offered_in(customer=customer_04, sector=?D).
Logged on day 285, notice sup_011 records that effective day 285, rul_011 is superseded by rul_032, and from that day rul_011 no longer applies.
